title: helianthemum conquense
intro: Helianthemum conquense, also known as Rockrose, is a flowering plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, to treat skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds. The plant's health benefits include its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and promote tissue repair. Herbal preparations of Helianthemum conquense include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to support skin health and wound healing.
